scripts.build:firefox: tsc -b && vite build --mode firefox && node scripts/firefox-manifest.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:firefox
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js scripts/firefox-manifest.mjs scripts/smoke-chromium-extension.mjs scripts/validate-artifacts.mjs scripts/validate-version.mjs scripts/verify-reproducible-build.mjs scripts/manifest.schema.json tests/e2e .github
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json vite.config.ts playwright.config.ts eslint.config.js scripts/firefox-manifest.mjs scripts/smoke-chromium-extension.mjs scripts/validate-artifacts.mjs scripts/validate-version.mjs scripts/verify-reproducible-build.mjs scripts/manifest.schema.json tests/e2e .github
scripts.quality: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e && npm run validate:version && npm run verify:reproducible && npm run validate:artifacts
